name: StarLab
description: Stereo time-warped reverberator with three structures, variable-rate reverb core, regenerative shimmer, glimmer, pre-delay/Karplus-Strong string voice, LFO, resonant low-pass and four-slot favorite presets.

controls.name: DRY
controls.description: Unprocessed signal level to output. Analog path, zero-latency, never digitized.
controls.detail: min: mute · noon: unity · max: +3dB boost

controls.name: INPUT GAIN
controls.description: Gain into reverb core through soft-clipping input stage.
controls.detail: LED: green = clean · red = soft-clip · blue = input gated by IN GATE CV

controls.name: WET
controls.description: Overall wet signal level to output.
controls.detail: WET CV: ±5V offset sums with knob

controls.name: DECAY
controls.description: Reverb tail length. At high values decay time is shaped by the FILTER section.
controls.detail: DECAY CV: ±5V offset

controls.name: SIZE / PITCH
controls.description: Variable processing rate of the reverb core. Scales core size and pitches regenerating audio.
controls.detail: ±1 oct range · min: 1/2x size · max: 2x size · CV: 1V/oct ±2V

controls.name: TEXTURE
controls.description: Three reverb structures select the grain of the tail.
controls.detail: sparse: granular-sounding distinct reflections · dense: plate-like fast response · diffuse: slow-building atmospheric wash

controls.name: INFINITE
controls.description: Button. Holds reverb input indefinitely; new audio keeps being processed by the reverb. 2s hold enters PITCH QUANTIZE scale mode.
controls.detail: Default latching · momentary via REGEN-hold at power-up

controls.name: FAVORITE
controls.description: Button recalls currently selected preset. Hold + center-button selects 1 of 4 slots. Hold until green flashes to save.
controls.detail: 4 preset slots · DIP-1 ON enables spillover between preset and manual

controls.name: SHIMMER
controls.description: Pitch-shifted reverb voicing amount. OFF at fully CCW.
controls.detail: Interval ±1 oct · secondary: hold REGEN + turn for interval · −detune/+detune near noon · CV: ±5V

controls.name: GLIMMER
controls.description: Dynamic harmonic spectrum enhancement applied to input or regenerating signal.
controls.detail: OFF at CCW · CV: ±5V

controls.name: REGEN
controls.description: Button. Toggles shimmer placement: regenerative (inside reverb loop) vs. input (before reverb structure).
controls.detail: LED green: regenerative · LED off: input shimmer

controls.name: HIGH BAND
controls.description: Button. Selects which harmonic band the glimmer enhances.
controls.detail: LED green: high-band · LED off: low-band

controls.name: FEEDBACK
controls.description: Regeneration in the delay line. In Karplus mode, sets string decay and structure resonance.
controls.detail: CV: ±5V offset

controls.name: DELAY / TUNE
controls.description: Pre-delay 0–1.5s (log taper). With TAP/TRIG CV becomes clock div/mult. In Karplus mode, coarse string tuning over 4 octaves or fine 12 semitones with SIZE/PITCH CV.

controls.name: ECHO ON
controls.description: Button. Routes delay output to WET bus (mixed with reverb). Bypassed = pre-delay only. In Karplus mode, mixes the dry string with wet.
controls.detail: Default latching · momentary via ECHO ON-hold at power-up

controls.name: TAP / TRIG
controls.description: Button. Tap tempo in delay mode. Quick press plucks string in Karplus; hold continuously bows.
controls.detail: Clock range 25 ms – 3 s · max delay time 7.5s

controls.name: LOW DAMP
controls.description: Removes low-end from output and from the regenerating reverb core as knob turns CW. In Karplus mode, damps low end of string.
controls.detail: CW: aggressive low-cut

controls.name: HIGH DAMP
controls.description: Removes high-end from regenerating reverb structure as knob turns CW. With LOW PASS engaged, becomes 24dB/oct resonant low-pass output filter. In Karplus mode, damps string decay harmonics.
controls.detail: HIGH DAMP CV: ±5V · positive V opens filter

controls.name: LOW PASS
controls.description: Button. Converts HIGH DAMP into a 24dB/oct variable-resonance low-pass at the output.
controls.detail: Secondary: hold LOW PASS + turn HIGH DAMP to set LOW PASS resonance (Q)

controls.name: SPEED
controls.description: LFO period. Sets envelope decay when ENV shape selected. Acts as clock div/mult when LFO CLK IN detected.
controls.detail: 15 s (0.067 Hz) – 1/15 s (15 Hz) · clock div 8/6/5/4/3/2 first half · mult 2/3/4/5/6/8 second half · noon = 1:1 · CV: ±5V

controls.name: SHAPE
controls.description: Six LFO waveforms: triangle, square, ramp, saw, random, envelope.
controls.detail: env shape responds to input dynamics; DEPTH sets envelope sensitivity

controls.name: DEPTH
controls.description: Modulation amount. Attenuverter for EXT LFO IN signal. With ENV shape: noon = off, CW = positive env, CCW = negative env.
controls.detail: OFF at CCW (non-env) · CV: ±5V · attenuverter centered at noon when EXT LFO IN patched

controls.name: LFO TARGET
controls.description: Three-way switch: delay (delay time / Karplus tuning), pitch (SIZE/PITCH), filter (HIGH DAMP cutoff).
controls.detail: Filter target subtle without LOW PASS engaged

inputs.name: LEFT IN
inputs.description: Left audio input. Use alone for mono.

inputs.name: RIGHT IN
inputs.description: Right audio input.

inputs.name: INFINITE
inputs.description: Engages infinite hold of input into reverb. Latching by default; momentary via REGEN-hold power-up.

inputs.name: IN GATE
inputs.description: Gates audio into reverb (INPUT GAIN LED blue when muted). In Karplus mode, continuously bows string. Momentary by default; latching via HIGH BAND-hold power-up.

inputs.name: FAVORITE
inputs.description: Rising edge toggles between manual panel state and selected Favorite preset.

inputs.name: SHIMMER
inputs.description: Offset for SHIMMER amount; knob sums with CV.

inputs.name: INTERVAL
inputs.description: Shimmer pitch interval, quantized to semitones over ±1 octave.

inputs.name: HIGH DAMP
inputs.description: Offset for filter cutoff; positive V opens filter.

inputs.name: GLIMMER
inputs.description: Offset for GLIMMER amount.

inputs.name: LFO CLK IN
inputs.description: Syncs LFO with phase alignment; SPEED knob becomes clock div/mult.

inputs.name: SPEED
inputs.description: Offset for LFO SPEED.

inputs.name: DEPTH
inputs.description: Offset for LFO DEPTH.

inputs.name: EXT LFO IN
inputs.description: External modulation source routed to LFO TARGET. DEPTH acts as attenuverter centered at noon.

inputs.name: SIZE/PITCH
inputs.description: 1V/oct reverb pitch CV summed with knob. In Karplus mode, tracks string pitch over 4 octaves (0–4V).

inputs.name: WET
inputs.description: Offset for WET level.

inputs.name: DECAY
inputs.description: Offset for DECAY time.

inputs.name: CLEAR
inputs.description: Clears audio data from reverb buffer.

inputs.name: FEEDBACK
inputs.description: Offset for FEEDBACK / Karplus string decay.

inputs.name: ECHO ON
inputs.description: Toggles ECHO ON button. Latching by default; momentary via ECHO ON-hold power-up.

inputs.name: TAP / TRIG
inputs.description: Clock-sets delay time (DELAY/TUNE acts as divider/multiplier) or plucks the Karplus string on rising edge.
inputs.voltage: 0–5V rising edge · 25 ms – 3 s clock range

outputs.name: LEFT OUT
outputs.description: Left audio output. Sums mono if RIGHT OUT unpatched.

behaviors.name: Three reverb structures
behaviors.description: sparse produces audibly distinct reflections — granular-style textures on staccato input, clean tails on sustained. dense is a plate-like tank with fast response that ventures into ambient at long DECAY. diffuse is a slow-building atmospheric wash with reverse-like attacks. Each re-routes the internal tank topology, not a tonal filter change.

behaviors.name: Variable-rate reverb core
behaviors.description: Scales the process rate of the reverb tank. CCW halves core size and drops regenerating audio one octave; CW doubles size and raises pitch one octave. Combined with SHIMMER it produces pitch-shifted tails that track incoming V/oct.

behaviors.name: Karplus-Strong string voice
behaviors.trigger: Hold ECHO ON + turn DELAY/TUNE CW until TAP/TRIG LED glows red
behaviors.description: Swaps the delay line into a monophonic plucked/bowed string synthesizer. FEEDBACK sets string decay, LOW/HIGH DAMP damps body harmonics, DELAY/TUNE coarse-tunes over 4 octaves, SIZE/PITCH CV is 1V/oct, TAP/TRIG plucks (quick press) or bows (hold). IN GATE CV continuously bows. Exit by holding ECHO ON + turning DELAY/TUNE CCW until TAP/TRIG blinks green.

behaviors.name: Karplus pitch-tracking trim
behaviors.trigger: Hold LOW PASS + turn INPUT GAIN
behaviors.description: Trims V/oct tracking of the Karplus string to compensate for external CV calibration offsets. Noon = nominal; below noon tracks flatter, above noon tracks sharper. Persists through power cycles.

behaviors.name: Pitch-quantize scale mode
behaviors.trigger: Hold INFINITE until LED blinks amber
behaviors.description: Quantizes SIZE/PITCH knob and 1V/oct CV to one of 15 scales shown by a binary pattern on SHIMMER/GLIMMER/FEEDBACK/DELAY LEDs: octave, root+5th, pentatonic, minor blues, Major, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, harmonic minor, whole-tone, minor/Major chord stacks with monotone input, chromatic. Turn SIZE/PITCH while holding INFINITE to pick a scale; hold LOW PASS + turn SIZE/PITCH to set scale portamento.

behaviors.name: Delay as clock-locked effect
behaviors.description: DELAY/TUNE becomes a clock divider/multiplier with eleven ratios (1/4, 1/3, 1/2, 2/3, 3/4, 1/1, 3/2, 5/3, 7/4, 2/1, 5/2) around the knob. Delay time maxes at 7.5 s with a 3 s clock period × 5/2. ECHO ON routes the delay into the wet bus; bypassed, DELAY/TUNE is a simple pre-delay into the reverb.

behaviors.name: Infinite hold with continuous play
behaviors.trigger: INFINITE button or gate on INFINITE CV
behaviors.description: Freezes the signal present at the reverb input; new incoming audio continues to be processed by the reverb structure over the frozen bed. Latching by default; hold REGEN at power-up to switch to momentary. Differs from IN GATE which mutes the input entirely.

behaviors.name: Regenerative vs. input shimmer
behaviors.description: Regenerative (LED green): shimmer sits inside the reverb feedback loop, producing the classic octave-stacking ambient bloom. Input (LED off): shimmer applies pitch-shift once at the input of the reverb structure — flat pitched wash without compounding octave stacks. Interval set by SHIMMER knob secondary function (hold REGEN + turn).

behaviors.name: Resonant low-pass at output
behaviors.description: Repurposes HIGH DAMP as a 24 dB/oct variable-resonance low-pass at the final output. HIGH DAMP CV still controls cutoff (positive V opens). Hold LOW PASS + turn HIGH DAMP knob to set resonance (Q) — CW peaks, CCW gentler roll-off. Disable LOW PASS to restore HIGH DAMP's reverb-core damping role.

behaviors.name: LFO envelope follower
behaviors.description: Replaces the LFO with an envelope follower driven by input dynamics. SPEED sets envelope decay rate; DEPTH is centered at noon — CW for positive depth, CCW for negative. Target via LFO TARGET. Combined with filter target, creates dynamic reverb ducking.

behaviors.name: External modulation via EXT LFO IN
behaviors.trigger: Cable patched into EXT LFO IN
behaviors.description: Any external CV is routed through the LFO TARGET switch. DEPTH knob becomes a bipolar attenuverter with unity at the CW/CCW extremes and zero at noon. Lets function generators or envelopes drive SIZE/PITCH, delay time or filter cutoff without using the dedicated CV inputs.

behaviors.name: LFO clock sync with ratios
behaviors.description: Syncs LFO with phase alignment to the incoming clock. SPEED knob turns into a discrete clock div/mult: /8 /6 /5 /4 /3 /2 on the first half, ×2 ×3 ×4 ×5 ×6 ×8 on the second half, 1:1 at noon. Works for any SHAPE, including env.

behaviors.name: Favorite preset spillover
behaviors.description: Enables reverb tail spillover when toggling between the manual panel state and the selected Favorite preset via FAVORITE CV or button. Off: preset recall cuts the tail. Four preset slots are recalled by holding FAVORITE + pressing one of the four center buttons (SHIMMER/GLIMMER/FEEDBACK/DELAY).

behaviors.name: CV response at power-up
behaviors.trigger: Hold REGEN / HIGH BAND / ECHO ON at power-up
behaviors.description: INFINITE CV toggles latching↔momentary by holding REGEN at power-up (default latching). IN GATE CV toggles with HIGH BAND hold (default momentary). ECHO ON CV toggles with ECHO ON hold (default latching). Persists until changed.

patchIdeas.name: Diffuse ambient bloom
patchIdeas.patch: TEXTURE: diffuse · DECAY 3 o'clock · SHIMMER ~noon with REGEN on · GLIMMER ~10 o'clock, HIGH BAND on · LOW DAMP ~9 o'clock, HIGH DAMP ~1 o'clock · sparse synth plucks bloom into slow octave-stacking wash with soft highs
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Texture: diffuse
* Decay: 3 o'clock
* Shimmer: noon · REGEN on
* Glimmer: ~10 o'clock · HIGH BAND on

Synth:

- Synth (Out) -> StarLab (LEFT IN)
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- StarLab (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Karplus string voice
patchIdeas.patch: enter Karplus (hold ECHO ON + DELAY/TUNE CW until TAP/TRIG red) · FEEDBACK ~2 o'clock · ECHO ON engaged · sequencer 1V/oct into SIZE/PITCH CV · gate into TAP/TRIG CV for plucks · IN GATE for bowed passages · light reverb tail with TEXTURE: dense, DECAY ~11 o'clock
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Mode: Karplus-Strong
* Feedback: ~2 o'clock
* Texture: dense
* Decay: ~11 o'clock
* Echo On: engaged

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> StarLab (SIZE/PITCH)
- Sequencer (Gate) t> StarLab (TAP/TRIG) // pluck
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- StarLab (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Clock-locked dotted-8th delay + plate
patchIdeas.patch: ECHO ON engaged · DELAY/TUNE at 3/4 ratio · FEEDBACK ~50% · TEXTURE: dense · DECAY noon · master clock at quarter notes into TAP/TRIG CV · rhythmic delay tails land dotted-8ths, plate reverb glues everything
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Texture: dense
* Echo On: engaged
* Delay/Tune: 3/4 ratio
* Feedback: ~50%

Clock:

Source:

- Clock (Out) c> StarLab (TAP/TRIG)
- Source (Out) -> StarLab (LEFT IN)
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- StarLab (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Scale-quantized pitch-shifted tails
patchIdeas.patch: hold INFINITE until LED blinks amber · turn SIZE/PITCH while holding INFINITE to pick a scale (e.g. minor blues) · TEXTURE: sparse · REGEN on · SHIMMER ~noon · 1V/oct sequencer into SIZE/PITCH CV — reverb core pitch-tracks the sequencer inside the selected scale
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Texture: sparse
* Shimmer: noon · REGEN on
* Pitch Quantize: Minor Blues

Sequencer:

Source:

- Source (Out) -> StarLab (LEFT IN)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> StarLab (SIZE/PITCH)
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Envelope-ducked reverb
patchIdeas.patch: SHAPE: env · DEPTH ~10 o'clock (negative env) · LFO TARGET: filter · LOW PASS engaged, HIGH DAMP ~2 o'clock, resonance low · reverb tails duck under transients then open up on the decay — pumping ambient
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Shape: env
* Depth: ~10 o'clock (negative)
* LFO Target: filter
* Low Pass: on
* High Damp: ~2 o'clock

Source:

- Source (Out) -> StarLab (LEFT IN)
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- StarLab (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Infinite frozen pad under new input
patchIdeas.patch: play a chord, press INFINITE or gate INFINITE CV · frozen bed holds while new input continues to pass through the reverb structure · TEXTURE: diffuse, DECAY max · play a melody over the pad · CLEAR CV rising edge erases the frozen bed
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Texture: diffuse
* Decay: max

Gate:

Trigger:

Source:

- Source (Out) -> StarLab (LEFT IN)
- Gate (Out) g> StarLab (INFINITE)
- Trigger (Out) t> StarLab (CLEAR) // erase pad
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- StarLab (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Chorus / flange via modulated pre-delay
patchIdeas.patch: ECHO ON bypassed (delay becomes pre-delay) · DELAY/TUNE very short (~9 o'clock) · LFO TARGET: delay · SHAPE: triangle · SPEED ~2 Hz · DEPTH ~11 o'clock · FEEDBACK low for chorus, high for flange · dry signal modulated into reverb
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Echo On: off
* Delay/Tune: ~9 o'clock
* LFO Target: delay
* Shape: triangle
* Speed: ~2 Hz

Source:

- Source (Out) -> StarLab (LEFT IN)
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- StarLab (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: LFO-clocked pitch wobble
patchIdeas.patch: master clock into LFO CLK IN · SHAPE: random · SPEED set to /4 clock division · LFO TARGET: pitch · DEPTH ~1 o'clock · reverb core pitch jumps to a random interval every four bars, phase-locked to the rest of the rack
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Shape: random
* Speed: /4 clock division
* LFO Target: pitch
* Depth: ~1 o'clock

Clock:

Source:

- Clock (Out) c> StarLab (LFO CLK IN)
- Source (Out) -> StarLab (LEFT IN)
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Two-voice Karplus with external envelope
patchIdeas.patch: Karplus mode · IN GATE CV from a gate source continuously bows · EXT LFO IN from a function generator · LFO TARGET: delay (modulates string tuning) · DEPTH centered for subtle vibrato · gentle TEXTURE: sparse reverb behind · playable bowed-string voice with vibrato
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Mode: Karplus-Strong
* LFO Target: delay
* Texture: sparse

Sequencer:

Function:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> StarLab (SIZE/PITCH)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> StarLab (IN GATE) // bow
- Function (Out) >> StarLab (EXT LFO IN) // vibrato
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- StarLab (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Self-oscillating resonant LPF voice
patchIdeas.patch: LOW PASS on · hold LOW PASS + HIGH DAMP CW for max Q (self-oscillation) · TEXTURE: dense, DECAY low, WET max · sequencer 1V/oct into HIGH DAMP CV (positive V opens filter) to play the resonant sine · reverb tail adds space to the filter pitch
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Low Pass: on · high Q
* Texture: dense
* Decay: low
* Wet: max

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Pitch) >> StarLab (HIGH DAMP)
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- StarLab (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Preset morph spillover
patchIdeas.patch: save a dense plate to Favorite slot 1 (hold FAVORITE until green, press slot button) · enable DIP-1 spillover · set manual panel to a diffuse shimmer wash · clock gate into FAVORITE CV · every gate-edge morphs between plate and shimmer with tail crossfade
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Favorite 1: dense plate
* Manual: diffuse shimmer
* DIP-1: ON (spillover)

Clock:

Source:

- Source (Out) -> StarLab (LEFT IN)
- Clock (Out) t> StarLab (FAVORITE) // morph
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- StarLab (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Quantized shimmer interval sweep
patchIdeas.patch: SHIMMER ~1 o'clock, REGEN on · INTERVAL CV fed from a stepped random/quantizer (±5V, ±1 oct, semitone quantized) · TEXTURE: diffuse, DECAY ~2 o'clock · tails rebuild at a new pitch interval each step — harmonised ambient
patchIdeas.diagram:
StarLab:
* Shimmer: ~1 o'clock · REGEN on
* Texture: diffuse
* Decay: ~2 o'clock

Random:

Source:

- Source (Out) -> StarLab (LEFT IN)
- Random (Out) >> StarLab (INTERVAL)
- StarLab (LEFT OUT) -> Output (L)
- StarLab (RIGHT OUT) -> Output (R)
